name: Wilbur Soot
description:
• You have fleas

I came back for like the ninth time, Wilbur's bots have been scanning lately and taking advantage of the fact that I'm having nightmares about fleas, he created this. As an extra hint, you're supposed to be a hybrid or something. I don't know, I'm too tired to think 🚬🦐
creator: Ash-is-not-from-wales
